content.en:
There is no empty Milky Way, a cliff riverbed.

This was originally an ordinary river area of the Voidless Galaxy, and there lived a group of Voidless Galactic creatures - the Fish.

Under normal circumstances, the hegemons would hardly come here.

But on this day, the cliff riverbed shook, the endless void shattered, and even the water of the voidless galaxy poured into a void area.

Moreover, the silver-white light shone on the void in all directions, which immediately attracted the attention of many creatures in the Voidless Galaxy, and the news naturally reached the ears of those overlords.

Suddenly, one overlord after another came here to investigate the situation here.

The Dragon Scale Overlord, the Void Whale Overlord, and other overlords all descended one by one.

Rumble!!!!!

A black giant ape came across the void, and the terrifying aura made the other overlords present tremble slightly.

"I've seen the Overlord of Qingshan!"

"I've seen the Overlord of Qingshan!"

"I've seen the Overlord of Qingshan!"

One overlord after another became extremely respectful, even the Dragon Scale Overlord and the Void Whale Overlord did not dare to be disrespectful in the slightest.

You must know that these overlords are very arrogant, and the reason why they are respectful to the Qingshan overlord now is naturally because of the strength of the Qingshan overlord.

The Overlord of Qingshan is the third overlord of the Voidless Galaxy, and has condensed nearly 100,000 immeasurable blood, and has also cultivated into a superior immeasurable body, and has cultivated to the limit, and has also mastered an immeasurable extreme domain technique.

In the eyes of the Qingshan overlord, the other overlords are all ants that can be destroyed at will.

At this moment, the Qingshan Overlord ignored the overlords around him, except for a few overlords whose strength was okay, the other overlords were not worth mentioning, and he was not qualified to respond.

The Overlord of Qingshan looked at this place, and did not rush into this void area that suddenly appeared.

"Judging from the aura that emanated, this should be a dark void that has existed for a long time, but a resource bred inside has reached a certain critical point, shattering the dark void, and this is revealed!"

The Overlord of Qingshan muttered.

And what this resource is, they already have some guesses.

"Void Silver Water!"

This thought arose in the hearts of many overlords.

As soon as they thought that this place was very likely to contain Void Silver Water, they were extremely excited.

The value of the Void Silver Water is still above the Hailou Tianjin, and the Hailou Tianjin, which can help the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms break the shackles and condense immeasurable blood, and it is also useful for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have condensed immeasurable blood.

But more and more immeasurable blood is condensed, and the usefulness of Hailou Tianjin will gradually decrease, until it is completely useless.

Moreover, Hailou Tianjin was of little use to an existence like the Qingshan Overlord, and it could not help the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage to impact the fourth stage.

But the Void Silver Water is different, it is still of some use to an existence like the Overlord of the Mountains, at least it can accelerate the condensation of immeasurable blood.

However, even the Void Silver Water could not help the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage to impact the fourth stage.

If you want to hit the fourth stage and temper your whole body with 1296 million immeasurable blood, you can use the advanced thing of Void Silver Water, Void Golden Water!

Wow!

The Overlord of the Mountains rushed into this Void Region, and his target was not Void Silverwater.

After all, the Void Silver Water can only accelerate cultivation, which is of little significance, and he also has several resources that can accelerate cultivation.

For him, what was truly valuable was the Void Golden Water.

"The place where the Void Silver Water was born is very likely to give birth to a small amount of Void Gold Water, I hope this treasure land has given birth to enough Void Gold Water!"

Qingshan Overlord secretly said.

Rumble!!!!

One of the Overlords also rushed in, they didn't want to take a step slow, causing the Void Silver Water to be snatched away by the other Overlords.

......

"What's that?"

Not long after an overlord rushed into this treasure land in the void region, he encountered a small person with a silver-white light all over his body.

These villains seem to be weak, but they have a special power that instantly cuts off the small half of the overlord's body.

As if the defense of the hegemon was not worth mentioning under this force.

Although he was cut off a small half of his body, the overlord was only slightly injured, and his body healed quickly, but his internal injuries had not yet recovered.

It's not just this overlord, but other overlords have also been attacked.

"It is the companion creature of the Void Silver Water - the Void Silver Spirit, if the Void Silver Water produces a lot of it, such an associated creature will be born, and the existence of the Void Silver Spirit means that there is a lot of Void Silver Water here. The strength of the Void Silver Spirit is not strong, and it is comparable to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, but they can mobilize the power of the Void Silver Water to burst out with a terrifying explosion that cuts everything, so just be careful. "

A well-informed overlord reminded the other overlords.

Subsequently, the other overlords were more careful, and killed these Void Silver Spirits one by one, and also found a lot of Void Silver Water, and they were very excited one by one.

At the same time, the Overlord of Qingshan also came to the depths of this treasure land.

"Found it, it really gave birth to the Void Golden Water!"

The Overlord of Qingshan said excitedly.

In these endless years, he had only collected a very small amount of Void Golden Water, which was far from enough for him to attack the fourth stage.

Now, he had finally found the Void Silver Water again.

"Fortunately, the White Mountain Overlord and the Blue Night Overlord, those two guys have been in retreat to impact the fourth stage, completely blocking the perception of the outside world, no one can contact them, they shouldn't know the situation here, so they won't come to compete with me for these Void Golden Water!"

Qingshan Overlord secretly said.

Just as he shuttled over, trying to take away the Void Golden Water, some golden villains stopped him.

"Void Golden Spirit!"

The Qingshan Overlord frowned slightly.

The Void Golden Spirits were comparable to high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they were comparable to the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but they were able to mobilize the power of the Void Golden Water here, and the power that erupted was even enough to threaten him.

If it was just a few Void Golden Spirits, after all, it was with the help of power, and there were still many flaws, and he could kill them one by one.

But there are a lot of Void Golden Spirits here, and the combined power is enough to threaten his life!

"No matter what, no matter what, we have to snatch the Void Golden Water here!"

The Overlord of Qingshan rushed over directly and fought with these Void Golden Spirits.

Thundered!!!!

Battles in this area have attracted the attention of other regional overlords.

Suddenly, these overlords were taken aback, they didn't expect that there was such a terrifying Void Golden Spirit here, if they encountered it, they would definitely die!

"Hurry up and grab some Void Silver Water and withdraw!"

Some of the hegemons thought to themselves.
